# Partenaire Croissance
> AI-powered B2B software tools and missed call revenue recovery for home-service businesses running Google Ads.

## Services
- [Missed Call Revenue Recovery](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/sdr/): 24/7 call answering system that captures 100% of Google Ads leads, qualifies callers, and books appointments. Only $25/qualified appointment.

## Tools
- [TradeQuote Pro](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/tradequote/): Free construction estimating calculators for contractors and trades.
- [All 21 Tools](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/): Free B2B calculators, compliance trackers, and business utilities.

## Guides
- [Blog](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/blog/): SEO-optimized guides on Google Ads for tradies, missed call recovery, and construction estimating.

## About
Partenaire Croissance provides free B2B software tools and a missed call revenue recovery system for home-service businesses across Canada.
